title: Contracts
subtitle: Your commitments at a glance: deadlines, rates, advances and recoupment.

recoup.heading: Understanding recoupment
recoup.done: Advance fully recouped — your royalties are now being paid out.
recoup.left: {remaining} left to recoup before your first royalty payouts.

advance.title: 1 · The advance
advance.body: At signing, the counterparty pays you {advance}. It is a loan against your future income, not a gift.

recoup.title: 2 · Recoupment
recoup.body: Your royalties ({rate} of revenue) pay back that advance first: {recouped} repaid so far.

payout.title: 3 · Payouts
payout.body: Once the advance is 100% recouped, every euro of royalties lands directly in your account.
